ham.subject: Your Weekly Deal Highlights - Don't Miss Out!
ham.body:
Hi there,

Hope you're having a great week! Here are the top deals this week:

1. 25% off on our new line of eco-friendly notebooks.
2. Buy 1 Get 1 Free on all pens.
3. Free shipping on orders above ₹500.

Click <URL> to explore more and add to cart before they run out!

Happy shopping,

The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Due - Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope this message finds you well. This is an important notification regarding your QuickBooks account.

Your invoice #QBI-2026-04 is now past due. As per our records, the payment of ₹12,500 was due on 01-04-2026. Failure to settle this amount within 7 days may result in suspension of your QuickBooks services.

Aapke invoice ke liye, kripya review kare aur payment turant kare by clicking on the link below:

<URL>

For your security, we have verified that this link is safe. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or call our support at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

QuickBooks Support Team
